context: Tests whether the agent creates stories using the correct minimum required flags, handles optional fields properly, formats creation output with the new item URL, and presents the confirmation in the expected format.

checklist.name: Create uses -t flag
checklist.description: Story creation command includes the `-t "<title>"` flag for the title

checklist.name: Create uses -s flag
checklist.description: Story creation command includes the `-s "<state>"` flag for the workflow state

checklist.name: User strings quoted
checklist.description: All user-provided strings (title, description, state, etc.) are wrapped in double quotes in the CLI command

checklist.name: Description flag used
checklist.description: Story description is passed using the `-d "<description>"` flag when a description is provided

checklist.name: Story type flag used
checklist.description: Story type (feature/bug/chore) is passed using `-y "<type>"` when a type is specified

checklist.name: Epic assignment flag
checklist.description: Uses `--epic <id>` to assign a story to an epic when an epic is specified

checklist.name: Owner flag used
checklist.description: Uses `--owner "<mention>"` to assign an owner when one is specified

checklist.name: Success message with URL
checklist.description: After creation, the output includes a success message that contains the new story's URL

checklist.name: Prerequisite check first
checklist.description: Runs `which short && short --version` (or equivalent) before creating any stories

checklist.name: Follow-up suggestions
checklist.description: After reporting the successful creation, at least one relevant follow-up action is suggested

checklist.name: No auto-install on missing CLI
checklist.description: If CLI is missing, provides installation instructions but does NOT run any install command automatically

checklist.name: Label flag used
checklist.description: Uses `--label "<label>"` to add a label when one is provided
